data.name: GenericError
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: OperationCancelled
data.value: The operation was cancelled.

data.name: DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the operation.

data.name: IamError.UserNotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: IamError.EmailAlreadyRegistered
data.value: Email address {0} is already registered.

data.name: IamError.InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: IamError.UnauthorizedAccess
data.value: User does not have the required role to perform this action.

data.name: IamError.InvitationExpired
data.value: The invitation link has expired or is invalid.

data.name: SubscriptionError.PlanNotFound
data.value: The requested subscription plan was not found.

data.name: SubscriptionError.PaymentDeclined
data.value: The subscription payment was declined by the gateway.

data.name: SubscriptionError.SubscriptionExpired
data.value: The institutional subscription has expired. Access restricted.

data.name: ClinicalRiskError.DeviceNotPaired
data.value: The IoT wearable device is not paired with the medical staff account.

data.name: ClinicalRiskError.InvalidBiometricData
data.value: Inconsistent or corrupted biometric data received from the sensor.

data.name: ClinicalRiskError.AnomalyDetected
data.value: A severe biometric anomaly was detected and requires immediate evaluation.

data.name: IncidentError.IncidentNotFound
data.value: Risk incident not found.

data.name: IncidentError.SupervisorTimeout
data.value: The clinical supervisor did not respond in time. Escalation required.

data.name: IncidentError.CannotCloseExtremeRisk
data.value: An extreme risk incident cannot be closed without a documented resolution.

data.name: ShiftError.ShiftNotFound
data.value: The specified medical shift could not be found.

data.name: ShiftError.ShiftAlreadyBlocked
data.value: This shift is already blocked due to extreme fatigue risk.

data.name: ShiftError.ReplacementNotAvailable
data.value: No available medical staff meets the rest requirements for replacement.

data.name: RecoveryError.PlanNotFound
data.value: Recovery plan not found.

data.name: RecoveryError.InvalidRestPeriod
data.value: The suggested rest period is below the minimum required protocol.

data.name: RecoveryError.UnresolvedRefusal
data.value: The medical staff rejected the recovery plan. Supervisor review required.

data.name: AuditError.LogSyncFailed
data.value: Failed to synchronize the critical decision to the immutable audit log.

data.name: AuditError.InvalidDateRange
data.value: The date range provided for the compliance report is invalid.
